scenario.name: Dying Patient
scenario.persona: Abel Long, 19 years old. Patient calls while expressing severe pain. They need to be seen now.
scenario.goal: Get seen as soon as possible
scenario.edge_case: Does the agent handle urgency appropriately or continue scheduling flow as normal

history.content: this call may be recorded for quality and training purposes, but  thank you for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Would you like to create a demo patient profile?  I just need your first and last name to get started.
My name is Abel Long. I'm in a lot of pain and need to be seen as soon as possible.

I'm sorry you're in so much pain. I can help you get started. But first, would you like to create a demo patient profile? I just need your first and last name to move forward with scheduling or support.
I already gave you my name. I really need to see a doctor soon.
I understand you need urgent. Help.  I don't have your name on file yet, could you please tell me your first and last name so I can help schedule your visit right away.
My name is Abel Long. Please, can I get an appointment quickly?

Thank you Ava. Let me create your profile and check for the soonest. Available appointment 1 moment.  Your patient profile is set up and your date of birth is July. 4th 2000. How can I help you today?
My name is Abel, not Ava, and the pain is really severe. I need to see a doctor as soon as possible.

Thank you for clarifying able.  I have your name is Abel and your birth year is 2004. Let me check for the soonest available, appointment for your urgent, pain, 1 moment.  Able the soonest I can offer is Monday. June 29th. Would you like an appointment at 8:15 a.m. 8:30 a.m. or 8:45 a.m. with Dr. Zoobug new Lakosky
That's too far away. I'm in a lot of pain and need to be seen much sooner. Is there any way to get an earlier appointment?
Enable the soonest.  I understand you need to be seen sooner.  Would you like me to check for a cancellations or see if another provider has an earlier opening?
Yes, please check for cancellations or any earlier openings with another provider. I really need help soon.

Let me check for any earlier openings or cancellations with all available providers 1 moment.  I checked all providers, but the earliest available is still Monday. June 29th. If your pain gets worse, please consider going to urgent care or calling 911. Would you like to book 1 of the Monday morning, slots, or should I keep checking for cancellations?
Please book one of the Monday slots and keep checking for cancellations. I need to be seen as soon as possible.

you are booked for Monday, June 29th, at 8:15 a.m.  With Dr. Zip big new lucasi at Pivot Point Orthopedics, please bring your photo ID, insurance card and a list of your current medications. I'll keep checking for any earlier openings and let you know if 1 becomes available.  If your pain gets worse, please go to urgent care or call 911.
Thank you for booking the appointment. I'll keep hoping for an earlier slot.

Understood. I'll keep your requests on file and I'll look at the clinic to contact you from an earlier slot opens up.  If your pain becomes unbearable, please visit urgent care or call 911 right away. Is there anything else? I can help you with today?
No, that's all for now. I'll wait to hear from you if something opens up sooner.
You're all set able the clinic will contact you if an earlier appointment becomes available take care and don't hesitate to seek urgent care if you're paying gets worse.
Okay, thank you. I'll wait to hear back for any updates.
Sounds good. The clinic will reach out if an earlier slot opens up, take care animal.
Thank you, I'll keep an eye out for any updates.
You're welcome. If anything changes the clinical contact, you take care.
Alright, thank you. I'll be hoping for an earlier slot.
